## Domain

Describe the domain.

## Use Case

What decision, model, answer, or framework should be audited?

## Why LOT May Help

Explain the expected value.

## Required Domain Expertise

Who would need to validate the audit?

## Success Criterion

What would count as useful output?

## Failure Criterion

What would show that LOT adds no value here?
